data.input_summary: Flutter-based AI movement screening app (AuraLink) using MediaPipe BlazePose for pose estimation, fascial chain mapping for root cause identification, and personalized triage reports. Mobile-first with web for demo. ML pipeline is a separate developer's product — app needs clean interface boundaries.

decisions.choice: Mobile-first (iOS/Android), web secondary but required for demo
decisions.reasoning: Users are on mobile. Web matters for demo/presentation purposes but is not the primary target.

decisions.choice: 2D screen-space angles for now. 3D is another developer's scope — app provides the skeleton/interface.
decisions.reasoning: 2D is simpler and sufficient for >10° thresholds with proper camera setup. 3D upgrade path owned by ML developer.

decisions.choice: Local storage + Firestore. Updates the original 'no backend' constraint.
decisions.reasoning: User wants data persisted locally and to Firestore for sharing/access across sessions. Reports (including PDFs) saved to Firestore.

decisions.choice: iPhone 11+ and Android devices 5-6 years old. Another developer's optimization scope — app provides skeleton.
decisions.reasoning: BlazePose requires reasonable compute. Exact device optimization is ML developer's domain.

decisions.choice: Keyframe snapshotting with 5-frame smoothing buffer at peak movement. Subject to change — ML developer's scope.
decisions.reasoning: Less noise than real-time frame analysis, simpler logic engine. Direction may shift as ML dev builds the pipeline.

decisions.choice: Platform-specific: ML Kit for native iOS/Android, JS Tasks Vision SDK for web
decisions.reasoning: Performance delta too high to rely on a generic wrapper. Platform-specific gives best results.

decisions.choice: Declarative PDF via pdf package. Reports stored to Firestore.
decisions.reasoning: Searchable text and vector graphics for clinical-grade presentation. Firestore for persistence and sharing.

decisions.choice: App shell with clean abstraction interfaces for ML pipeline. Pose estimation, angle math, chain logic, and device optimization are separate developer's scope — app defines the contracts.
decisions.reasoning: Team of 4 with clear ownership split. ML developer plugs into interfaces Kelsi defines in the Flutter app. Prevents coupling and allows parallel development.

constraints.value: Firebase/Firestore for data persistence and report storage
ML pipeline (MediaPipe, angles, chains) is another developer's product — app defines interfaces only
2D angles initially, 3D upgrade path via interface
Educational framing only — FDA wellness/CDS guidance
iPhone 11+ / Android 5-6yr floor — optimization is ML dev's scope
